critic_notes: Seven questions on Elements des IT-Grundschutzes. All quotes are verbatim in the normalized section source. Topic assignments are well-chosen: 'bausteine' for questions about layer model structure, Baustein content, and Umsetzungshinweise; 'methodik' for questions about the security level achieved by different Vorgehensweisen. Question 007 is labeled 'experte' and requires synthesizing two distinct reasons for the Sicherheitsmanagement Baustein from non-adjacent sentences -- appropriate difficulty. All answers are source-supported; all distractors are properly wrong. Page and schema checks pass.
